# ESE-28

This report provides field intelligence on Geordie AI, identified as the vendor representing the "Early Stage & Innovation Sandbox" category with a focus on "vCISO / GRC automation" at RSA Conference 2026. While the user prompt specified "ESE-28," no vendor by that exact name was found. Geordie AI, as the winner of the RSAC 2026 Innovation Sandbox contest, aligns strongly with the described profile and its offerings are highly relevant to modern GRC challenges in the age of AI agents.

## RSA 2026
-   **Booth number and hall:** Kiosk 12, Moscone South, Early Stage Expo.
-   **Any updated booth info from the conference floor:** Geordie AI was named the "Most Innovative Startup 2026" at the RSAC Innovation Sandbox contest on Monday, March 23, 2026. They are also hosting practitioner-level discussions with their engineers on Tuesday, March 24, at The Harlequin.

## Company Profile
-   **Employee count (approximate):** Approximately 29 employees.
-   **Founded year:** Early 2025.
-   **HQ location:** London, UK, with a team also based in the US.
-   **Funding stage or public status / ARR if known:** Geordie AI secured $6.5 million in seed funding in September 2025, co-led by Ten Eleven Ventures and General Catalyst. As a Top 10 Finalist in the Innovation Sandbox, they also received a $5 million investment. The company is currently generating revenue, which has increased tenfold in the two months leading up to RSA Conference 2026.
-   **Website URL:** www.geordie.ai.
